titleStmt.title: SII 16.213: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 213. (A.R. No. 473 of 1923.) YEḶAÑJI, RAYADRUG TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated 14[7]8, Naḷa, Jyēshṭha śu. 15 corresponding to 1556 A.D., May 24, (Sunday). There was a lunar eclipse on this day.

It records that on the complaint of the villagers, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Viṭṭalarāja Tirumalarājayyadēva Mahārāja stopped the illegal collections of money in Yeḷahañji, Sōmalāpuram, etc., by the Hasāṇidyagāṇḍlu and directed that the fines, etc., collected in the village should be utilised for repairing temples, tanks, etc. Dakshiṇāmūrti-śivāchārya is mentioned as the donee. As in No. 212 above, the grant appears to have been made a month earlier in Vaiśākha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmacaṁdrāya namaḥ . śubhamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trai
lōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣa
ṁbulu 1478 Agunanēṭi naḷasaṁvatsara jēṣṭha śu 15 lu śrīmaNmahārājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadāśivamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁddu ratnasiṁhā
sanārūḍhulai pṛthvisāṁbrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu . śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarā
ju viṭhalarāju tirumalayyadēvamahārājulugāru . śrīmanmahārāyagurunāmadhē
yāṁka paramanaiṣṭhika rāyadurggaṁ śīmaku cellēṭi yeḷahaṁji sōmalāpuraṁ ceru
kallu prākaṁḍutanapalle sarvamānyaAgrahārāla śrīmaddakṣiṇāmūrti śivācā
ryulayyavāriki daṁḍaṁpeṭṭi Iccina dharma śilāśāsanakramameṭlannanu . sadāśiva mahā
rāyalu māku nāyaṁkkarānaku pāliṁccina rāyadurggaṁ śīmaku celleṭi yeḷahaṁji
sōmalāpuraṁ prāṁkuḍutanapalle mī Agrahārālaku nēmu sarvamānyaṁgā
śēsina vivaraṁ mī Agrahārālaṁdu hasāṇidyagāṁḍlu Anyāyaṁ śēśi rokhaṁkoṁpōvu vāra
ni mīru mātōceppaṁgānu nēmu lekhalu parāmarśiṁci mī Agrahārālaṁdu
Acēmāḷunnu veṭavēmiṁni mī Agrahārālaṁdu kṣētra vikhāgālu śēśē Aṁdu
ku puccukonivuṁḍē kāṇikeluṁnnu yivē modalainavi mānitimi mī yī grāmālaṁdutappucē
śina vārivallavaccina Aparādhaṁ māḷuṁnnu Ā Agrahārālaṁdu dēvasthānaṁ ceruvukuṁṭa kā
luvalaku vēsikonēṭaṭṭugānu mīku kaṭṭaḍi śēstimi . yivi modalainavi Anninni viṭhala rājayyaku
puṇyaṁgānu mahāvaiśākha śu 15 mi puṇyakālamaṁdu dhārabōsi Iccina sarvamānya dha
rmaśilāśāsanaṁ . yī dhammānaku yavvarū tappinānu tama mātāpitṛlanu kāśilō vadhiṁci
na pāpāna bōvuvāru gōbrāṁhmalanu vadhiṁcina pāpāna bōvuvāru Ani yiccinadharma śilā
śāsanaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁjāyatē krimiḥ . yēkaiva bhaginī lōkē
sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā na kara grāhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā . maṁgaḷa mahāśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
